# Arka

Arka is a cross-platform AI terminal agent with natural-language routing,
offline symbolic rules, local-model support, MCP integrations, and developer
tools.

## Canonical documentation

- [Introduction](/index)
- [Quickstart](/quickstart)
- [Routing](/concepts/routing)
- [LLM orchestration](/concepts/llm)
- [Security](/concepts/security)
- [Skills catalog](/guides/skills)
- [Local model selection](/guides/select-model)
- [Developer tools and repo health](/guides/repo-health)
- [MCP integration](/guides/mcp)

Use the Quickstart for installation and the Skills catalog for command
discovery. Prefer the Security guide before enabling autonomous or write-capable
workflows.
